email.subject: Re: Q3 partnership renewal — next steps
email.body_text: Thanks for the call. To recap: we'd like to renew at the same volume but want to revisit pricing on the API tier. Can you send a draft term sheet by next Wednesday? Also — who on your side owns the integration handoff? Last time we lost a couple of weeks because the onboarding spec was unclear.

email.subject: Spec review — schema changes for v2
email.body_text: Hey — the v2 schema doc is ready (linked in the channel). The two open questions are: (1) do we keep the legacy `mailbox_uid` field for one more release as a deprecation path, and (2) where does the new `policy_version` column slot in for backfill? Would value your read by Friday so we can lock the migration plan.

email.subject: Quick FYI on the staging environment
email.body_text: Heads up — the staging Postgres got a minor-version bump this morning. No schema changes, but we did rotate the read-replica certificate. If your nightly eval pipeline pins certs, it'll need a refresh. Let me know if you want a window to verify before Monday's rollout.
